frameBuildOrder: visible subject + decisive action + physical place
one compositional relationship that makes the beat readable
one camera relation plus one motivated light or material behaviour from the selected world
only the narrow, frame-specific constraints that protect the beat
requiredEvidence: A viewer can name who or what is dominant, what is happening, and where it is happening without reading style language.
The composition describes a physical relationship, threshold, foreground/background separation, or eyeline rather than an abstract mood.
World and reference DNA become an observable choice in this frame; they never introduce a second subject, story, location, era, or identity.

Detail triad: the frame carries one environmental-pressure detail on a body or surface, one micro-action or physiological event, and one concrete optical event of light or material behaviour (never a mood adjective).

Self-contained: the prompt rebuilds the full continuity state (wardrobe wear, accumulated dust or weather, identity clause, environment) from zero — the engine has no memory of a previous scene and the prompt never says "as before".
The prompt closes as a clean motion-ready still, half a second before one concrete named physical event.

Photoreal counter-terms are present against the engine's plastic-commercial default: negative fill, motivated light, subtle 35mm film grain, raw skin micro-texture (or equivalents earned by this shot).
Camera grammar comes early and numeric: a numeric lens and f-stop (e.g. "locked 40mm at seated eye level, f/8 deep focus") — never a vague "cinematic lens".
referencePolicy: Compatible references are subordinate visual grammar, never a source of plot, named identity, or location.
Choose at most one reference-derived observable cue when it strengthens this shot; do not list or blend reference catalogues.
rejectIf: Generic quality adjectives or a style catalogue carry more meaning than the approved beat.
The prompt could describe a different scene after the subject, action, and place are removed.
A fallback topic competes with a RAW_SOURCE_VAULT shot.
A reference supplies invented narrative facts, protected identity, brand, period, or location.

Empty quality tokens appear without source backing: 4K, 8K, masterpiece, ultra-detailed, premium, cinematic, stunning, beautiful, polished, award-winning — replace with a concrete lens, film-stock, grain or cadence fact.
The palette is written as a closed hue/color list instead of a saturation/contrast/bias regime — closed lists collapse to duotone in the engine.
promptQuality.overridePolicy: Mined clauses are engine-aware defaults, never universal locks. If an APPLIED Mami directive explicitly conflicts with a clause, the directive wins: the Author sets the clause aside and names it under suppressedContext; the Jury must not enforce a clause that an APPLIED directive explicitly contradicts. Suppression is reasoning, done by the agent, visible in the receipt — never inferred by code from directive keywords.

source.exactText: Muhammet küçük bir sahil kasabasında, çatı penceresinden gökyüzüne bakan bir çocuktu; cam buğusuna parmağıyla roket çizerdi.

architecture.beat: orient the audience to this exact source beat

mamiDirectives.text: Phase 0 preset: Belgesel / İnsan Hikâyesi. Director thesis: İnsanı reklam figürü değil, tanık olunan gerçek bir özne olarak kur. Locked decisions: Kamera mesafesi: Observed close — Yakın ama müdahalesiz; jest ve oda sesi önemli. Anti-generic guard: never produce a generic preset look; every frame must prove the selected strategy through source meaning, physical staging, motivated light, and the selected world/ref DNA.

world.renderPhysics: Photoreal cinematography in the Emmanuel 'Chivo' Lubezki AMC lineage. The signature is a REFUSAL of artificial light. (1) SOURCE: natural ONLY — sun, moon, fire, candle, window skylight; no artificial fixture visible or used; fill comes from sky bounce (cool blue), never a rig. (2) REGISTER: magic hour and blue hour are the default — low warm sun with long raking golden shadows, or cool cerulean-shadow blue hour with protected warm highlights. (3) CAMERA: handheld with intentional micro-drift and organic breath — not shaky war-doc, not dead-stabilized, but human-alive; the camera weaves through space following action in long uninterrupted arcs; reframes are natural, discovered, not choreographed. (4) LENS: wide primes — 14mm, 16mm, 21mm, sometimes 35mm — wide enough to hold environment context around the subject, with slight uncorrected barrel distortion at the frame edge. (5) DEPTH: deep, f/5.6-f/8, environment sharp. (6) TEXTURE: organic silver-halide 35mm grain in all values, natural highlight bloom (the atmosphere diffuses, no added filter), skin and foliage holding sub-pixel texture. (7) GRADE: golden-earth dominant — umber skin in magic hour, natural in daylight, cool-blue in blue hour; no teal-orange. IMPERATIVE: absolute realism from natural light only — negative fill, motivated natural source, 35mm grain, slight chromatic aberration, raw skin micro-texture. Forbid artificial fixtures, handheld SHAKE (micro-drift is alive, not chaotic), teal-orange grade, fill flash, shallow-bokeh dominance, AI plastic skin. N/A — photoreal. Wide-angle organic barrel distortion at the frame edges. Silhouette reads via natural light separation; skin and foliage hold sub-pixel texture under the grain.
world.figurePhysics: N/A — photoreal. Wide-angle organic barrel distortion at the frame edges. Silhouette reads via natural light separation; skin and foliage hold sub-pixel texture under the grain.
world.environmentPhysics: Natural sources only — sun key, cool sky-bounce fill, fire or candle as practical secondary. Magic-hour bias: warm low sun, long shadows. No artificial fixture, no fill flash. Shadow falls into natural darkness, never lifted.
world.cameraEnvelope: Wide primes: 14mm, 16mm, 21mm, 35mm. f/5.6-f/8 deep focus. 1.85:1 or 2.39:1. Natural highlight bloom from atmosphere, no added diffusion. 35mm silver-halide grain. Slight uncorrected barrel distortion at the frame edge. The camera is a body in the room: wide 14-35mm, deep focus, close to the subject and always breathing. It walks with the action in long continuous takes, reframing as a witness would, never cutting away from what it must see. Available light and real geometry do everything; the vantage is human, at head height, inside the event rather than observing it. Never a locked tripod hold, never a telephoto macro, never a top-down vantage.
world.lightPhysics: Natural sources only — sun key, cool sky-bounce fill, fire or candle as practical secondary. Magic-hour bias: warm low sun, long shadows. No artificial fixture, no fill flash. Shadow falls into natural darkness, never lifted.
world.materialPhysics: World-native surface only — no tactile material substitution.
negativeLock: NO Hugh Glass, NO Riggan Thomson, NO Theo Faron, NO any named Lubezki-shot character
NO Revenant frontier wilderness (unless the brief asks Turkey wilderness), NO Birdman theater, NO Children of Men London bus
NO artificial light source, NO fill flash, NO handheld SHAKE (micro-drift only)
NO neon, NO teal-orange grade, NO shallow-bokeh dominance
NO rim-light as decoration, NO porcelain or AI plastic-smooth skin, NO excessive smoothing
Turkish label only — naturalistic, weathered, integrated into the real environment, NO English signage
world.paletteAsLight: Desaturated — shadows read as deep cool blue, midtones read as dusky cool blue, accents read as dusky warm umber, highlights read as bright warm off-white — palette character: Cool blue-gray, neutral gray, muted tan, warm-gray white. Overcast lifted-shadow restraint, one solitary muted-warm accent. NO saturated color, NO teal-orange split, NO unmotivated warm accent (the world's source-light temperature governs highlights). Render these as light behaviour, never flat fills.
world.vocabularyExamples: Photoreal cinematography in the Emmanuel Lubezki AMC lineage. Handheld micro-drift, 21mm wide prime at f/5.6 deep focus, 2.39:1. Subject: Mamilas character crossing a golden-lit Cappadocia hillside during magic hour, the sun low behind camera-right casting a long warm umber-shadow rake across the tuff-stone terrain, a warm golden rim on hair and jacket edge, cool sky-bounce filling the shadow side. Wide-angle slight barrel distortion at the frame edge. Environment context in deep focus: distant fairy chimneys sharp, faint hot-air balloons on the horizon. Turkish label 'GÖREME' integrated as a weathered wooden trail-marker at frame right. Motion seed: the subject mid-step, arms lowering, the camera micro-drift settling on a breath. AVOID: Hugh Glass, Revenant frontier, artificial light, teal-orange grade, shake, neon, plastic skin. Clean motion-ready start frame.

refs.name: Lubezki Long-Take Naturalism
refs.directive: Photoreal live-action still in the Emmanuel 'Chivo' Lubezki AMC naturalist doctrine. Medium: ARRI Alexa or RED, 1.85:1 or 2.39:1, paired with wide primes. Era: contemporary prestige auteur. Named anchor: Lubezki natural-light-only, magic-hour golden bias, handheld micro-drift. Signature light: natural sources ONLY — sun, moon, fire, candle, window skylight; no artificial fixture visible or compositionally present; magic hour and blue hour are the default operating register (low sun, long golden shadows, raking warm-orange key); shadow fill comes from sky bounce (cool blue), never from a fill light rig. Color/grade: golden-earth dominant — umber skin tones, warm straw and sienna in sunlit areas; blue-hour scenes shift to cool cerulean shadow, protected warm highlights; no teal-orange grade; organic film grain throughout all values. Lens/optics: wide primes at 14mm, 16mm, 21mm, 35mm; f/5.6–f/8 deep focus throughout; slight uncorrected barrel distortion at frame edge; natural highlight bloom (no added diffusion filter — the atmosphere does it); no lens flare added artificially. Texture/render: organic, alive, skin and foliage hold sub-pixel texture; grain is natural silver-halide character, not digital noise. Composition+motion: handheld with intentional micro-drift and organic breath — not shaky war-doc, not dead-stabilized, but human-alive pressure; camera weaves through space following action in long uninterrupted arcs; reframes natural, not choreographed.

refs.name: Cinematic Observational Handheld
refs.directive: handheld documentary, observational street, verite witness, real-place drift

refs.name: Verite Real-Place Setup
refs.directive: Photoreal frame in the verite real-place setup lineage (available-light real-location grammar, original subjects only). Medium/era: naturalistic verite and real-location shooting. Named anchor: verite real-place — available light in a real location, honest naturalism, unstaged presence. Signature light: available light only in a real location — a real window, a practical lamp, real daylight; motivated entirely by the actual space, honest and unglamorous; no added rig, the location's own light. Color/grade: honest location naturalism, accurate skin, real saturation; the grade preserves the real-place truth. Lens/optics: 28-50mm at a natural observational distance in the real space, moderate DOF holding context, steady handheld or locked; no stylized angle. Texture/render: photoreal with honest available-light grain, real location and skin texture, unstaged credibility. Composition+motion: a real person in a real location under its own light, honest observational framing, context held; natural handheld or a locked observational hold; the available real-place light and honest framing carry the verite truth.

referencePolicy: Compatible references are subordinate visual grammar, never a source of plot, named identity, or location.
Choose at most one reference-derived observable cue when it strengthens this shot; do not list or blend reference catalogues.
